subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-12-16 in Abu Sinan
subcodes.first_line: In every Dispensation there have been three persons: In the Dispensation of Moses, there was Moses, and the Fire, and the Speaker on Sinai... in the terminology of the philosophers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در هر دوری سه شخص بوده است: در دور موسی، موسی و نار و مکلم طور... باصطلاح فلاسفه
subcodes.subjects: @the cross and the trinity, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity
